relationships: kab:Ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer Marikan aseggas i d-iteddun
kab:Ad tedduɣ ad d-aseɣ ɣer Boston deg Tubeṛ
kab:Yezmer ad rzuɣ ɣer Boston Tubeṛ i d-iteddun
kab:Deg ddunit-im ma truḥeḍ ɣer Paris﹖
kab:Deg ddunit-ik ma truḥeḍ ɣer Paris﹖
kab:Deg ddunit-nkent ma truḥemt ɣer Paris﹖
kab:Ad ruḥeɣ ɣer Boston tafsut-a i d-iteddun
kab:Ad d-tasem ɣer Montreal taggara n dduṛt-a﹖
kab:Ur ilaq ara yakk ad yerr ḥedd dḍen-is ɣer yiman-is
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad d-tkecmeḍ kan akka ɣer da
kab:Ula d mary ur tezmir ara ad tṛuḥ ɣer Boston
kab:Yewwi Tom Mary ɣer wanda ara tili deg tɣellist
kab:Ur yezmir ara Tom ad iruḥ ɣer tesdawit
kab:Yella wasmi i ken-yefka ubrid ɣer taddart-nneɣ﹖
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad d-ttaseɣ ɣer da yal ass
kab:Ad ruḥeɣ ɣer Ustralya ddurt i d-iteddun
kab:Ur yelli ara yessefk ad d-tased ɣer da
kab:Tom yetteddu aṭas ɣer din akken ad yurar icahen
kab:Marie tella teggurreɛ-d deg webrid-nnes ɣer wexxam
kab:Ruḥeɣ ɣer din iwakken ad as-mmeslayeɣ
kab:Acḥal i tebɣiḍ ad tedduḍ ɣer wanda akken i tebɣiḍ ad truḥeḍ
kab:Ad iṛuḥ Tom ɣer Boston ayyur i d-iteddun
kab:Ur yelli ara yessefk ad teddu ɣer uxxam ɣef uḍar
kab:Ttif ad txedmeḍ tura, wala ad tendemmeḍ ɣer sdat
kab:Ur nezmir ara ad nerzu ɣer Boston imalas-a
